name: Email Response Management SOP
description: Brain for Bull BRO templating and response style
golden_rules: ALWAYS push for a call at the end of every response (in a nice, non-pushy way)
Include specific time slots when pushing for calls
Use case studies to overcome objections

jan@3wrk.com.function: Post-booking communications - meeting confirmations, cancellations, reschedules, follow-ups

partnership@alementary.tv.function: Inbound partnership inquiries for Alementary brand - warm leads who reached out first

imman_smartlead.function: Cold outreach replies - leads who did NOT reach out first

variables.{{meeting_date_time}}: Specific date and time of meeting
variables.{{schedule}}: Two specific time slot options with timezone
variables.{{relevant_content_type}}: Industry-specific content type based on lead's business
variables.{{provide_2_time_slots_with_dates_and_ti: Two time slots with dates and timezone

lead_declined_meeting.trigger: Lead declined a scheduled meeting in calendar system
lead_declined_meeting.script:
Hey {{first_name}},

Saw that you declined the meeting scheduled for {{meeting_date_time}}. Something bad happened?

Best,
Jan
actions: Wait 48 hours for response
If no response → proceed to follow-up sequence

lead_missed_meeting_1.trigger: Lead booked but did not attend scheduled meeting
lead_missed_meeting_1.script:
Hey {{first_name}},

Seems like you missed the meeting scheduled for {{meeting_date_time}}. Something bad happened?

Best,
Jan

lead_missed_meeting_2.script:
Hey {{first_name}},

Does {{suggest_two_time_slots_next_week}} work for you?

Best,
Jan

lead_missed_meeting_3.script:
Have you had a chance to book a call yet? If no, here's a link to schedule a call: https://calendly.com/jan__w/partnership_itssimannn

Can't wait to chat.

Best,
Jan

lead_requested_reschedule.trigger: Lead asks to change meeting time
lead_requested_reschedule.script:
Hey {{first_name}},

I've rescheduled it for {{new_meeting_date_time}}. Let me know if that works for you and we can push it further if need be.

Best,
Jan
lead_requested_reschedule.alternative:
Got you {{first_name}}, take your time. I will just keep something in the calendar a few weeks from now so we don't forget.

Best,
Jan
actions: Update calendar with new meeting time
Send calendar invite for new time

multiple_cancellations.trigger: Lead has cancelled or rescheduled 3+ times
multiple_cancellations.script:
Hi {{first_name}},

I understand, things happen. I'll reschedule using the link. If there are any days or times in your calendar that won't work, just let me know upfront so we can lock in something that sticks.

We won't be able to reschedule again so let's make this one stick - we're running out of calendar real estate here :)

Looking forward to connecting.

Best,
Jan
actions: This is the final reschedule attempt
If they cancel again → remove from active follow-up

post_meeting_followup.script:
Hi {{first_name}},

Anything new that happened recently?

Best,
Jan

lead_needs_more_time.trigger: Lead needs more time after meeting
lead_needs_more_time.subject: Re: Meeting - {{company_name}}
lead_needs_more_time.script:
Got you man, keep building and if there's something new keep me posted! :)

Best,
Jan
actions: Set reminder for follow-up in 2-3 weeks
Update CRM with meeting notes

initial_inquiry.trigger: Brand reaches out asking about partnership, rates, or collaboration
initial_inquiry.script:
Hi {{first_name}},

Thanks for the offer — that's something for us to consider.

To give you an idea, we are one of the biggest tech channels out there averaging 4.9 million views per sponsored video across all platforms.

Recently, we've been focused on making brands go viral and have been doing partnerships through campaigns that contain 3-5 videos. Our rates typically range from $5k to $35k per campaign.

Here are some specific examples of our work:
- Suno AI (AI Music Creation Platform): 41 million views
- Xreal (Smart Glasses): 31 million views
- RYSE (Smart home device): 6.5 million views

Please find more details in this document, which includes stats, case studies, and testimonials: Our Process

Sounds like a fit?

Best,
Jan
actions: Wait 2-3 days for response
If interested → send booking link

lead_responded_positively.trigger: Lead replies showing interest after receiving general information
lead_responded_positively.script:
Hi {{first_name}},

Best way for us to move forward would be to get on a quick call so we can strategize what's possible and needed for our collaboration.

Would you be able to book a call here? https://calendly.com/jan__w/partnership_alementary

Best,
Alasdair
actions: Track if they book the call
If no booking within 3 days → send follow-up

followup_no_response.trigger: Lead hasn't responded 5-7 days after initial inquiry email
followup_no_response.script:
Hi {{first_name}},

We are doing a bit of a Q4 push for companies and we still have 2 spots for our partners; would you be interested in one of those?

Best way for us to move forward would be to get on a quick call so we can strategize what's possible and needed for our collaboration.

Would you be able to book a call here? https://calendly.com/jan__w/partnership_alementary

Best,
Alasdair

second_followup.trigger: Still no response 5 days after first follow-up
second_followup.script:
Hi {{first_name}},

Let us know what you think.

Best,
Alasdair
actions: If no response → Mark as unresponsive after 7 days

third_followup.trigger: Still no response after second follow-up, but lead seems high-value
third_followup.script:
Have you given it any thought?

Best,
Alasdair
actions: Use sparingly, only for high-priority leads
After this → Remove from active follow-up sequence

budget_too_low.trigger: Lead states budget is below $5k minimum
budget_too_low.script:
Hi {{first_name}},

The budget you have does not meet our current rates. Our minimum rate per project is $5k.

If you have any other project in the future, feel free to let us know.

Best,
Alasdair
actions: Keep in database for future outreach
Set reminder to check back in 6 months

suspicious_request.trigger: Lead asks to download software or follow unusual verification process
suspicious_request.script:
Hi {{first_name}},

We don't download software unless we've hopped on a call to verify this is legit.

If our rates are within your budget, we can schedule a quick intro call before or after the holidays. Let me know when you are free.

Best,
Alasdair
actions: Do NOT proceed until verification call is completed
Flag as potential spam/scam if request persists

interested.trigger: Lead expresses interest or wants to learn more
interested.script:
Hey {{first_name}},

Awesome to hear you're interested.

Let's jump on a quick call to discuss what would work best for {{company_name}}.

I'm free {{provide_2_time_slots_with_dates_and_timezone}} — either work?

Best,
Imman
actions: Send calendar link
Track if they book
Follow up in 3 days if no booking

pricing_question.trigger: Lead asks about pricing, rates, or costs
pricing_question.script:
Hey {{first_name}},

Great question. Our campaigns typically range from $15k to $50k depending on scope, number of videos, and targets.

Here's what we've done recently:
- Whiteout Survival: 49M views, 100k new users
- Gauth AI: 15M+ views across platforms
- CamScanner: 3M views

Worth a quick call to see what would make sense for {{company_name}}?

I'm free {{provide_2_time_slots_with_dates_and_timezone}}.

Best,
Imman
actions: Push for call booking
Track response

not_doing_influencer.trigger: Lead says they don't do influencer marketing or quarter's budget is allocated
not_doing_influencer.script:
Hey {{first_name}},

When is the next time you guys will be planning an influencer campaign? Is Q1, Q2 planning already done?

Best,
Imman
actions: Note which quarter they're planning
Set reminder to follow up 1 month before that quarter

revisit_in_few_months.trigger: Lead is interested but wants to revisit in a few months
revisit_in_few_months.script:
Hey {{first_name}},

Totally get it! Understand things are stretched atm.

Are you against me booking it first week of {{suggested_month}}? That way, it won't get lost.

Best,
Imman
actions: Schedule meeting for suggested timeframe
Send reminder 1 week before scheduled call

no_longer_at_company.trigger: Lead replies they've left the company
no_longer_at_company.script:
I see {{first_name}}. Hope some time off is doing great for you!

Is there anyone you could connect me with from {{company_name}} then?

Best,
Imman
actions: If they provide new contact → Replace and create new lead entry
Replace lead in Smartlead with new contact if provided

not_a_fit.trigger: Lead says partnership is not a fit without elaboration
not_a_fit.script:
Hey {{first_name}},

May I know the reason you think it's not a fit? When I was on the page I thought completely opposite.

Whiteout Survival also thought we might not be a right fit — after that we generated for them 50M views and 100k new signups.

Worth a few mins to chat?

Best,
Imman
actions: Wait for response explaining why
If they elaborate → Address specific concern
If no response → Follow up once more in 5 days

not_interested.trigger: Lead says they're not interested without specific reason
not_interested.script:
Hey {{first_name}},

Totally understand — quick question though, what made it feel like a no?

When I looked into your brand, I genuinely thought there was a strong fit.

We had a similar response from Whiteout Survival at first, and after a short call we helped drive 50M views and 100k new signups.

Worth a few mins to chat?

Best,
Imman
actions: Wait for response
If they provide reason → Address it
If firm not interested → Tag as Not Interested and stop outreach

company_bankrupt.trigger: Lead mentions company is shutting down or in financial trouble
company_bankrupt.script:
Hey {{first_name}},

Sorry to hear about that. Do you have any other friends in the industry I could connect with?

Best,
Imman
actions: Remove from active sequences
If they provide referrals → Create new lead entries

asked_about_target_audience.trigger: Lead asks Who is your target audience? or What demographics do you reach?
asked_about_target_audience.script:
Hi {{first_name}},

We have a unique way of reaching specific audiences. 79% of people watching our videos are non-subscribers—these are viewers chosen by the platform's algorithm based on their interests in the topics we cover.

So when we promote {{relevant_content_type}} content, the majority of the audience watching will be people the algorithm identifies as {{relevant_content_type}} enthusiasts based on their viewing history and interests.

As you've probably experienced yourself, platforms are very effective at targeting people based on what they've previously watched and engaged with.

Worth a quick call to dig into this more? I'm free {{provide_2_time_slots_with_dates_and_timezone}}.

Best,
Imman
actions: Push for call booking
Follow up if no response in 3 days

asked_about_geographic_targeting.trigger: Lead asks if you can target specific country or city
asked_about_geographic_targeting.script:
Hi {{first_name}},

We have a unique way of reaching specific audiences. 79% of people watching our videos are non-subscribers—these are viewers chosen by the platform's algorithm based on their interests in the topics we cover.

That being said, videos that we would record targeting people in {{country_city}} would be pushed by the algorithm to reach as many people from {{country_city}} as possible.

However, we can't guarantee that this will be the only city targeted, since after the videos go viral (sometimes reaching up to 50M views), it's natural for the algorithm to expand the audience beyond a single city.

Want to hop on a quick call to discuss how we can make this work for {{company_name}}? I'm free {{provide_2_time_slots_with_dates_and_timezone}}.

Best,
Imman
actions: Push for call booking
Follow up if no response in 3 days

asked_for_something_we_dont_do.trigger: Lead requests specific deliverable, structure, or approach we don't normally offer
asked_for_something_we_dont_do.script:
Hey {{first_name}},

It's possible that we can create a structure like that if we believe that the product is the right fit.

Let's chat about it - I'm available {{provide_2_time_slots_with_dates_and_timezone}}, either works?

Best,
Imman
actions: Propose meeting to discuss feasibility
After call → determine if request is viable

budget_lower_than_typical.trigger: Lead states budget is below $10k minimum
budget_lower_than_typical.script:
Hey {{first_name}},

Will remember you if we're going to have some spots for a smaller activation.

Best,
Imman
actions: Keep in database
Reach out if there are smaller opportunities in future

asked_for_video_examples.trigger: Lead asks Can you show me what the video would look like? or Can you send a creative concept?
asked_for_video_examples.subject: Re: Partnership - {{company_name}}
asked_for_video_examples.script:
Hi {{first_name}},

Here's the thing: the creative work is actually the bulk of what we do. Coming up with the right concept for a brand can take a week or two, sometimes even longer depending on the fit. We always personalize ideas based on the specific brand and goals.

What I can do now is send over examples of typical videos we've done for partners so you can see the format and style we work in:
- Whiteout Survival: https://www.tiktok.com/@itssimannn/video/7533077826682064158 — 49M views, generated 100k users
- CamScanner: https://youtube.com/shorts/m-UIN4IuC6I — 3M views across all platforms
- Gauth AI: https://www.tiktok.com/@itssimannn/video/7552689711941324063 — 15M views across platforms (total for the campaign)

But the actual campaign concepts get tailored once we dive deeper.

When it comes to investment, campaigns typically range from $15k to $50k depending on scope, number of videos, and the targets we're aiming for.

If you want us to create a full plan, we'd need to talk more about {{company_name}} first — just to make sure we're the right fit for each other and that we can actually promote it effectively.

Let's jump on a call - I'm free {{provide_2_time_slots_with_dates_and_timezone}}.

Best,
Imman
actions: Propose call to discuss custom strategy
Track if they book meeting
Pause sequence until return date
Block lead in Smartlead immediately
Try to get warm introduction first
Replace lead if introduction not possible
Remove from sequence unless new contact provided
Use Imman scripts for pricing/info questions
Push for call booking
Send calendar link immediately
Stop automation
Notify client
Use Document 2 scripts for detailed responses
